title: Senior devs quit big tech over trust
meta_description: Senior devs quit big tech without raises when systems fail in production. Learn how to build observability into your stack before the cascade starts — with real numbers, tools, and fixes.
prewritten_tweet:
Most senior engineers who quit big tech aren’t chasing higher pay.

They’re fleeing systems that collapse under real load.

Here is what actually keeps teams sane 👇
